name: wp-claudecode-session-fallback
title: Use CLAUDECODE=1 as fallback for session ID
description: When CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is not set but CLAUDECODE=1 is present, auto-derive session context from most recent agent file. Eliminates manual session file hunting in Claude Code sessions.

phases.title: Create session resolution helper
phases.description: Add function to resolve effective session ID: CLAUDE_SESSION_ID > CLAUDECODE+recent_agent_file > None

tasks.title: Add get_effective_session_id() helper in session.rs
tasks.description:
Create helper function that:
1. Returns CLAUDE_SESSION_ID if set
2. If CLAUDECODE=1 and no CLAUDE_SESSION_ID, looks for most recent agent-*.json
3. Extracts sessionId from that file
4. Returns the resolved ID or None

phases.title: Update session.rs to use helper
phases.description: Replace resolve_agent_id() calls to use the new effective session ID logic

tasks.title: Update resolve_agent_id() to use get_effective_session_id()
tasks.description: Refactor resolve_agent_id() to first establish effective_session_id, then use that to find the agent file. This makes CLAUDECODE=1 work transparently.

phases.title: Update nexus_client.rs session resolution
phases.description: Apply same logic to nexus_client.rs where CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is checked

tasks.title: Update nexus_client.rs to use effective session ID
tasks.description: In SessionResolutionStrategy, add CLAUDECODE=1 fallback before searching for most recent file. Import or call the session helper.

phases.title: Verify and test
phases.description: Build and verify that hex commands work with CLAUDECODE=1 set and CLAUDE_SESSION_ID unset

tasks.title: Build and test CLAUDECODE fallback
tasks.description: cargo build -p hex-cli, then test: unset CLAUDE_SESSION_ID, set CLAUDECODE=1, run hex sched enqueue. Verify it finds the session from recent agent file.
